channel.title: Hugo on Coding notes - and snippets
channel.description: Recent content in Hugo on Coding notes - and snippets

item.title: Create hugo site with docker
item.description: Create a Hugo site and run it from Docker without installing Hugo on the host. Add the Hugo Docker image Save this as Dockerfile in an empty working folder: FROM ubuntu RUN apt update && apt install hugo -y WORKDIR /site ENTRYPOINT [ "hugo", "-D" ] Build the image: docker build -t hugo . Create the site from Docker Create the site: docker run --rm \ -v "$(pwd)":/work \ -w /work \ --entrypoint hugo \ hugo new site my-site The site root is my-site/.

item.title: Adding Images to Hugo Sites
item.description: Goal Add images to the Hugo site pages using the appropriate method for the use case. Methods Page Bundles Place images alongside the markdown file: content/posts/my-post/ ├── index.md ├── my-image.jpg Reference in index.md: ![Alt text](my-image.jpg) or with full path: ![Alt text](/posts/my-post/my-image.jpg) Static Directory For globally shared images: static/images/my-image.jpg Reference in markdown: ![Alt text](/images/my-image.jpg) Hugo Figure Shortcode For captions and additional styling: Image Title With static directory: Image Title External URLs !
